summary: Sprint 10: TalosFit Partner Banner - All 10 requested features verified passing. Banner renders correctly on DNA tab for chicago@arena.com (Domina l'Arena) and admin@arenadare.com (Raggiungi lo status di Giant). All other tabs work without crashes.
critical_code_review_comments: The IIFE pattern `{dna && (() => { ... })()}` for the TalosFit banner works correctly but is somewhat unconventional. No functional issue.
avgDna falls back to manual calculation from dna object if eligibility.avg_dna is not yet loaded — works correctly since eligibility loads async via useFocusEffect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 10 TalosFit banner fully tested. Banner appears in DNA tab below RadarChart. Dynamic copy logic: chicago avg ~60 → 'Domina l'Arena.', admin avg >80 → 'Raggiungi lo status di Giant.'. Banner is a TouchableOpacity wrapping LinearGradient with gold border. All 5 tabs (kore, crews, nexus-trigger, dna, hall) work without crashes. Note: route for RANK tab is /hall not /rank.

feature_test_results.banner_visible_after_radar_chart: PASS - Banner visible below RadarChart section
feature_test_results.partner_ufficiale_badge: PASS - Badge with shield-checkmark icon visible
feature_test_results.scopri_i_coach_cta: PASS - CTA with arrow-forward icon visible
feature_test_results.t_logo_talos_fit_labels: PASS - T logo on right, TALOS/FIT labels visible
feature_test_results.premium_black_gold_gradient: PASS - Dark background with gold border (rgba(212,175,55,0.32)) visible
feature_test_results.chicago_dynamic_subtitle: PASS - chicago avg ~60 → 'Domina l'Arena.' (50-80 range correct)
feature_test_results.admin_dynamic_subtitle: PASS - admin avg >80 → 'Raggiungi lo status di Giant.' correct
feature_test_results.banner_touchable: PASS - TouchableOpacity click does not crash app, stays on /dna
feature_test_results.no_crashes_dna_tab: PASS - No error messages, no red screen errors
feature_test_results.other_tabs_working: PASS - kore, crews, hall all work without crashes

rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All Sprint 10 TalosFit banner features implemented correctly. Dynamic copy calculation uses eligibility.avg_dna when available, else falls back to computing from dna object values. The avgDna for chicago@arena.com = (69+66+55+48+44+79)/6 ≈ 60.2 which correctly maps to 'Domina l'Arena' (50-80 range). Admin has avg_dna > 80 mapping to 'Raggiungi lo status di Giant'.
